title: バンブーメモリー登場！

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm Bamboo Memory, head of the Tracen
Academy Disciplinary Committee!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, I'm working toward my debut! Just
thinking about the exciting days ahead has me
trembling with anticipation!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait because I have a blazing hot dream I
wanna fulfill! One day, I want to run in the
ultimate race against my ultimate rivals!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
That's been my dream since I was a kid, and I'll
pour every ounce of energy I have into making it
come true!
